title: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar
tagline: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar — spiritual town of Karnataka

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar, Karnataka

overview.short: Our Lady of Lourdes Church is a historic Roman Catholic Church dedicated to Our Lady of Lourdes situated at Kanajar near Karkala, India.
overview.description: Our Lady of Lourdes Church is a historic Roman Catholic Church dedicated to Our Lady of Lourdes situated at Kanajar near Karkala, India. The church was built in 1938. This church comes under Deanery of Karkala, Roman Catholic Diocese of Udupi.

topPlaces.name: Kanajaru
topPlaces.description: Kanajaru or Kanajar is a small village approximately 78 km north of Mangalore, 18 km west of Karkala and 33 km east of Udupi. Kanajaru is part of Karkala Taluk in Udupi District, Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala
topPlaces.description: Parashurama Theme Park is a tourist destination built on Ummikkal hill in Bailur near Karkala in Udupi district. A bronze statue of Lord Vishnu's sixth avatar, Parashurama, is placed on the top of the building on the hill.

topPlaces.name: Shirva, India
topPlaces.description: Shirva is a village in Udupi district of Karnataka in India.

topPlaces.name: Pernankila
topPlaces.description: Pernankila (also Peranankila) is a village near Hiryadka of Udupi taluk in Udupi district. It is a mid-sized village located in Udupi district in the state of Karnataka in India.

topPlaces.name: Bommarabettu
topPlaces.description: Bommarabettu is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Udupi taluk of Udupi district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Attur, Udupi
topPlaces.description: Attur is a small village in Karkal taluk, Udupi District, Karnataka state, India. It comes under Nitte panchayat and is a part of Mysore Division.

topPlaces.name: Belle, Udupi
topPlaces.description: Belle (also known as Bollay) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Kaup taluk of Udupi district.

topPlaces.name: Hiriadka
topPlaces.description: Hiriadka (Periyadka in Tulu) is a town in the Udupi District in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is quite close to Udupi.

items.note: Kanajaru or Kanajar is a small village approximately 78 km north of Mangalore, 18 km west of Karkala and 33 km east of Udupi. Kanajaru is part of Karkala Taluk in Udupi District, Karnataka, India.

Parashurama Theme Park is a tourist destination built on Ummikkal hill in Bailur near Karkala in Udupi district. A bronze statue of Lord Vishnu's sixth avatar, Parashurama, is placed on the top of the building on the hill.
Shirva is a village in Udupi district of Karnataka in India.
Pernankila (also Peranankila) is a village near Hiryadka of Udupi taluk in Udupi district. It is a mid-sized village located in Udupi district in the state of Karnataka in India.
Bommarabettu is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Udupi taluk of Udupi district in Karnataka.
Attur is a small village in Karkal taluk, Udupi District, Karnataka state, India. It comes under Nitte panchayat and is a part of Mysore Division.
Belle (also known as Bollay) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Kaup taluk of Udupi district.
Hiriadka (Periyadka in Tulu) is a town in the Udupi District in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is quite close to Udupi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kanajaru, Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala, Shirva, India, Pernankila, Bommarabettu.
